summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LOGITAG Premium SaaS - All 3 new pages (Activity, Alerts, Zones) are fully functional and properly connected to the router. Navigation between all pages works correctly.

minor.impact: Real-time features affected but core functionality works

minor.issue: 500 errors on some external API calls
minor.impact: Some data may not load, but app handles gracefully

issues: Stats text shows '0 localisés200 sans GPS' - missing space/separator between numbers (carried over from iteration 12)

passed_tests: Login flow with admin/user@1234 credentials - redirects to /tagdashboard/index
Dashboard: 4 KPI cards with real data visible
Dashboard: Mini map widget, alerts feed widget, activity timeline widget all present
Sidebar navigation: 'Activité' navigates to /LOGS/index and shows PremiumActivity component
Sidebar navigation: 'Alertes' navigates to /alert/index and shows PremiumAlerts component
Sidebar navigation: 'Zones' navigates to /Geofence/index and shows PremiumZones component
Activity page: Title 'Activité' with subtitle 'Historique des événements en temps réel'
Activity page: Stats cards showing 4 Entrées, 29 Sorties, 6 Alertes, 11 Hors ligne
Activity page: Filter chips (Tous, Entrées, Sorties, Alertes, Hors ligne) visible and clickable
Activity page: Search bar visible and functional
Activity page: Timeline events showing with asset images, names, actions, zones, times, badges
Alerts page: Title 'Alertes' with badge showing 43 unresolved alerts
Alerts page: Stats cards showing 29 Hors zone (19 unresolved), 14 Batterie, 10 Hors ligne
Alerts page: Filter chips (Toutes, Hors zone, Batterie, Hors ligne) visible
Alerts page: Search bar visible
Alerts page: Alert items with severity badges (Critique, Info), 'Marquer traité' buttons
Alerts page: Some alerts already marked as 'Traité' (green checkmark)
Zones page: Title 'Zones' with subtitle '4 zones configurées - 25 assets au total'
Zones page: Stats showing 1 Chantier, 1 Dépôt, 1 Zone restreinte, 1 Parking
Zones page: Leaflet map with CARTO tiles showing 4 polygon zones in different colors
Zones page: Zone panel with search input and zone list
Zones page: Zone items showing name, type badge, asset count, last activity
Zones page: 'Nouvelle zone' button visible
Zones page: Zone detail drawer opens on click with zone info, alert rules, Modifier/Supprimer buttons
Zones page: Zone detail drawer close button works
Assets page: Loads at /view/engin/index with card grid, search, filters, view toggle
Map page: Loads at /tour/index with fullscreen Leaflet map, sidebar with asset list
Navigation: Dashboard -> Activity -> Alerts -> Zones -> Dashboard (all work)
Navigation: Dashboard -> Assets -> Map -> Dashboard (all work)
action_items: Minor: Add separator between stats in map-stats overlay (e.g., '0 localisés | 200 sans GPS')
critical_code_review_comments: All 3 new pages (PremiumActivity, PremiumAlerts, PremiumZones) are properly imported in components.js
Route mappings correctly set: 'LOGS/index' -> PremiumActivity, 'alert/index' -> PremiumAlerts, 'Geofence/index' -> PremiumZones
EXTRA_MENU in config.js correctly adds the 3 new menu items
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
MOCKED: Zones page uses MOCK_ZONES (not API-driven)
MOCKED: Dashboard alerts/activity widgets use hardcoded data
Activity and Alerts pages generate events from real engine data
seed_data_creation: None - using external API data via proxy + mock data for Zones
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 premium pages (Dashboard, Assets, Map, Activity, Alerts, Zones) fully tested and working. Key routes: Dashboard at /tagdashboard/index, Assets at /view/engin/index, Map at /tour/index, Activity at /LOGS/index, Alerts at /alert/index, Zones at /Geofence/index. Login credentials: admin/user@1234. External API is slow (15-20 seconds for data load). Zones page uses MOCK_ZONES. Activity and Alerts generate events from real engine data. Map page is fullscreen with independent sidebar.

activity_page.timeline: Events showing with real engine data

alerts_page.alert_items: Showing with severity badges and 'Marquer traité' buttons

zones_page.map: Leaflet with CARTO tiles, 4 polygon zones
zones_page.zone_panel: Search + zone list with type badges
zones_page.zone_detail_drawer: Opens on click, shows zone info, alert rules, action buttons
